folio.label: 96v
folio.l: Honouretú hire , and louetú hire I preye
Who so me louetú , there is nomore to seye
¢ And for that no thyngö , of hire olde gere
She shulde brynge , in to his hous , he bad
That wommen shulde , dispoylen hire rigút there
Of whicú theise ladyes , weren no thyngö glad
To handle hire clothes , where Inne she was clad
But nathelees , this mayden brigút of hewe
Fro foot to hede , they clothed han al newe
¢ Hire heres they kemed , that leyn vntressed
Ful rudely , and witú here fyngeris smale
A corone on hire hede , they han I dressed
And sette hire ful , of Ouches grete & smale
Of hire array , what shulde I make a tale
Vnethe the peeple hire knew , for hire fairnesse
Whan she transmeeuyd was , in swicú richesse
¢ This Markys , hatú hire spoused , w a rynge
Brougút for the same cause , and thanne hire sette
Vp on an hors , snow whyte , & wel aumblynge
And to his Paleys , er he lengere lette
Witú ioyeful peeple , that hire lad and mette
Conveyed hire , and thus the day they spende
In reuel , tyl the Sonne gan descende
¢ And shortly fortú , this mater for to chace
I seye , that to this newe , Markysesse
God hatú swicú fauour sent hire , of his grace
That it ne semed nougút , by lyknesse
That she was born and fed , in rudenesse
As in a Cote , or in an Oxes stalle
But norisshed , in an Em¹oures halle
¢ To euäy wygút , she wexen is so deere
And worshipful , that folk there she was bore
And from hire birthe , knewen hire ©ere by ©ere
Vnethe trowed they , but durst han swore
That to Ianicle , of whicú I spak byfore
She dougúter were , for as by coniecture
Hem thougút she was , a nother creature
¢ For thougú that euäe , vertuous was she
She was encresed , in swicú excellence
Of thewes goode , I sett in hey bounte
And so discreet , and fair of eloquence
So benygne , and so digne of reuerence
And coude so , the peeples hertã embrace
That ecú hire louetú , that loked in hire face
¢ Nat oonly of Saluces , in the toun
Publisshed was , the bounte of hire name
